title: viburnum keteleeri var. macrocephalum
intro: Viburnum keteleeri var. macrocephalum, also known as the Large-headed Viburnum, is a plant species that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Viburnum keteleeri var. macrocephalum include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are used in traditional medicine to address a range of ailments.
